title: clinopodium maritimum
intro: Clinopodium maritimum, also known as Rock Rosemary or Sea Calamint, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium maritimum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
